channel.title: Poems on Sebastian Cavada
channel.description: Recent content in Poems on Sebastian Cavada

item.title: I thought
item.description:
I thought

I thought WE could have been better
I thought WE could have had it all
I thought WE could have been different

I thought WE,
but it was just me.

item.title: Some
item.description:
Some

Some sadness in my hearth
But I can’t feel

My head’s on pills
To gain inner peace

I feel like Leopardi
There is a bush in front of me
I can’t see clear

I lay on the grass
Feeling insecure
You gave me all

I gave you all away

Will I ever be forgiven?

item.title: What is
item.description:
What is

What is it when you think about her
all day long?

item.title: Non
item.description:
NON

non lasciare andare mai
chi ti scrive poesie
e canzoni

item.title: Forgetting
item.description:
Forgetting

There is no way to forget a person
It will just slowly be replaced
By someone else
